tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive completed successfully with --git-host other and fake URL; expected push failure was tolerated per PR #18

tests.name: approval_log_created
tests.details: APPROVAL_LOG.md present

tests.name: gitignore_created
tests.details: .gitignore present

tests.name: phase_state_json_phase_zero
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase = 0 immediately after init

tests.name: phase_state_project_set
tests.details: .project = uat-agent-26

tests.name: ci_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/ci.yml present (host: github default for ci file)

tests.name: release_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/release.yml present

tests.name: framework_clone_present
tests.details: .claude/framework/ directory created with 19 hooks + 14 rules

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install reports 'Context7 MCP installed' and 'Context7 MCP configured'

tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/desktop.md present

tests.name: no_residual_backup_dir
tests.details: .claude-backup/ removed by init.sh after CDF migration as expected

tests.name: pre_commit_gate_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json PreToolUse includes pre-commit-gate.sh on Bash matcher

tests.name: stop_checklist_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json Stop hook includes stop-checklist.sh from CDF

tests.name: pending_approval_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh present (PR #17 U-H fix verified)

tests.name: lint_uat_scenarios_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh present (PR #17 U-H fix verified)

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh --non-interactive from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 fix verified)

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 and --start-phase2 commands although both are valid actions parsed by the script

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: --start-phase1 succeeded (note: command is undocumented in --help)

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is an empty array after start

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: Iterated all 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized); each --complete-step succeeded with rc=0; no artifact-existence check exists for phase1 steps

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh exits 0 with 'Phase gates consistent.'

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After all phase1 steps + check-phase-gate, .current_phase remains 0 — no script auto-advances current_phase. This is U-D (still open from prior sweep). Manually set .current_phase=2 to continue downstream sections.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After init: bash scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase1; complete all 5 phase1_architecture steps; bash scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: .current_phase advances to 2 once phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase remains 0; no command in process-checklist.sh, check-phase-gate.sh, or anywhere advertised in builders-guide auto-advances the phase number

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: --start-feature uat-feat-1 set .build_loop.feature='uat-feat-1'

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: Sequential complete-step for tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated all rc=0; security_audit honored stub findings file at docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit of feat(uat-1) succeeded after 5 build-loop steps + security audit stub

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' returned rc=1 with [FAIL] block message — gate logic functional. Direct shell `git commit` (without going through PreToolUse) DID succeed: this is U-C (still open) confirmation, not a new bug. Recorded as documentation_gap.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After record-feature uat-feat-1 + complete-step feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2 build loop, ran all 5 steps, --check-commit-message rc=0 and shell `git commit` of feat(uat-2) succeeded — PR #17 grace window fix verified

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote sentinel via pending-approval.sh --offer; piping PreToolUse JSON to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh returned permissionDecision: deny with 'pending user decision' message

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: After pending-approval.sh --resolve, sentinel removed; PreToolUse JSON test no longer blocked by sentinel (subsequent gate output unrelated to sentinel)

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq .features_completed .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' (and later 'uat-feat-2')

documentation_gaps.gap: U-C confirmation: BL-006 commit-msg gate is enforced only via the PreToolUse hook + --check-commit-message API; direct shell `git commit -m 'feat(...)'` from a non-Claude shell still bypasses the gate. No commit-msg git hook is installed by init.sh.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: --start-phase3 rc=0 after manually setting current_phase=3 (U-D blocks auto-advance); test-gate.sh --check-phase-gate clears

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at non-null after --start-uat 1

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh against a hand-built populated HTML with 2 well-formed scenarios reports 'All 2 scenarios clean.' rc=0; on a malformed scenarios HTML the linter reports violations and rc=1 — linter functional

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched … gate_passed) complete-step calls rc=0

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: For sponsored_poc, --start-phase4 is intentionally blocked with 'Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in sponsored poc mode. POC projects complete at Phase 3.' This is correct gating behavior.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — Phase 4 correctly blocked by --start-phase4 with explicit 'POC projects complete at Phase 3' message and remediation pointer to scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production. Treated as a passing assertion (gate working as designed).

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc (gate refuses entry by design)

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — final phase remains 3 with poc_mode=sponsored_poc

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Regex scan for secret-shaped values (password|secret|token|api_key followed by a 16+ char string) returned 0 hits in committed files. Word-only matches are limited to framework templates/docs (e.g., 'API_KEY' placeholder in CI workflow), not real values.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log does not exist because no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches setup capture). git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ directories which were already in the gitStatus snapshot at session start; no framework files were modified by this UAT run.

summary: Base sponsored_poc desktop standard rust agent: init.sh --non-interactive, all PR #16-#19 fixes verified (BL-015 sentinel, BL-006 grace window, U-H helpers copied, U-N/U-O framework-self guard, U-B fake-remote tolerance); only finding is U-D confirmation (still-open: no script auto-advances current_phase) and U-C confirmation as documentation gap (no commit-msg git hook means direct shell commits bypass BL-006).
